raw.title: Why we’re still marching toward collapse—and how to break the trance
raw.excerpt: We continue down a path of collective destruction, in part because of a belief system so pervasive it feels like reality itself. Recognizing our deep interconnectedness is essential to building a more just and sustainable future.

llm_processed.summary: The article examines societal collapse narratives and cultural hegemony, using examples like domestic violence to highlight how systemic consent perpetuates oppression.
llm_processed.lateral_potential: Enables bridges to social justice movements and cultural resistance frameworks.
